# unifi_wifi_broadcast (Resource)

A WiFi broadcast (SSID) on the UniFi controller.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# A WPA2-only IoT SSID on one specific AP, bound to a VLAN.
# WPA2_PERSONAL (not transition) keeps legacy IoT gear that can't do WPA3 happy.

data "unifi_devices" "all" {}

locals {
  # Target one AP by its name, as shown in the UniFi console.
  iot_ap = one([for d in data.unifi_devices.all.devices : d.id if d.name == "Office AP"])
}

resource "unifi_wifi_broadcast" "iot" {
  name                         = "IoT Devices"
  security                     = "WPA2_PERSONAL"
  passphrase                   = var.iot_passphrase
  pmf_mode                     = "OPTIONAL"
  broadcasting_frequencies_ghz = ["2.4", "5"]
  network_id                   = unifi_network.iot.id
  broadcasting_device_filter   = [local.iot_ap]
  client_isolation_enabled     = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) SSID name.
- `security` (String) Security mode: OPEN, WPA2_PERSONAL, WPA3_PERSONAL, or WPA2_WPA3_PERSONAL.

### Optional

- `broadcasting_device_filter` (Set of String) UUIDs of the APs that broadcast this SSID. Omit to broadcast on all APs.
- `broadcasting_frequencies_ghz` (Set of String) Frequency bands to advertise on: any of "2.4", "5", "6".
- `client_isolation_enabled` (Boolean) Prevent clients on this SSID from reaching each other.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the SSID is enabled.
- `hide_name` (Boolean) Hide the SSID (do not broadcast the name).
- `network_id` (String) UUID of the network (VLAN) to bind clients to. Omit for the native network.
- `passphrase` (String, Sensitive) Pre-shared key (8-63 chars). Required for the personal security modes; omit for OPEN.
- `pmf_mode` (String) Protected Management Frames: REQUIRED or OPTIONAL. WPA3 implies required.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) WiFi broadcast UUID.
